title: Broadcom Task
description: A Task represents an asynchronous operation in VMware Cloud Foundation that tracks the progress and status of long-running infrastructure management activities.

id.description: The unique identifier of the task.

type.description: The type of the task operation.

status.description: The current status of the task.

creationTimestamp.description: The timestamp when the task was created.

completionTimestamp.description: The timestamp when the task completed.

isCancellable.description: Whether the task can be cancelled.

isRetryable.description: Whether the task can be retried after failure.

resourceId.description: The identifier of the associated resource.

type.description: The type of the associated resource.

resources.description: The resources associated with this task.

status.description: The current status of the subtask.

subTasks.description: The subtasks that make up this task.

remediationMessage.description: Guidance on how to resolve the error.
